news-global-econ.title: Trump rips NY Times as corrupt cowards – for reporting the same thing everyone else is about the Iran war
news-global-econ.description: President Trump escalates his battle with press, targeting The New York Times over its coverage of the Iran conflict and threatening legal action.

news-global-econ.title: Dem Sen. Murphy: 'Glad' Iran's 'Price' to Open Strait Was Ending Israeli Operation in Lebanon
news-global-econ.description:
On Tuesday’s broadcast of CNN’s “AC360,” Sen. Chris Murphy (D-CT) said that “the Lebanon-Israel war needed to stop, no matter what, and so I guess I’m glad that that was included in Iran’s price” to open the Strait of Hormuz.

news-global-econ.title: Helmet-style cockpit vision system aims to change how pilots see in low visibility
news-global-econ.description: FAA-certified for Boeing 737 Next Generation aircraft, AerAware combines enhanced vision technology and wearable displays as airlines evaluate new tools to support operations in low-visibility conditions.

news-global-econ.title: GOP voters pick Trump-backed nominee in battle to flip crucial House seat
news-global-econ.description: Trump-backed state senator Peter Oberacker wins GOP primary in New York's 19th district, setting up a general election fight against Rep. Josh Riley.

news-global-soc.title: U.N. Secretary-General Demands $1.3 Trillion a Year to Fight 'Climate Chaos'
news-global-soc.description:
United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres called for a massive increase in global climate spending, arguing that governments and financial institutions must devote significantly more resources to addressing climate-related challenges.

news-global-soc.title: President Trump Reiterates Support for 'National Right to Carry'
news-global-soc.description:
President Trump noted the NRA's hard work for the Second Amendment and made clear his administration is working on "national right to carry." 
The post President Trump Reiterates Support for ‘National Right to Carry’ appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: Trump signs landmark executive order investing in quantum computing and cryptography security
news-global-soc.description: President Donald Trump signed two executive orders on quantum computing, partnering with IBM and Google parent Alphabet to advance U.S. innovation.
